## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...`, and `gofmt -l .` are clean
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`go test`)
- [ ] Docs regenerated with `tfplugindocs` if `schema.go`, `examples/`, or descriptions changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
